clusters.title: Semiconductor Industry Trends
clusters.summary: The semiconductor industry is evolving rapidly due to advancements in artificial intelligence (AI). This shift is affecting various aspects such as foundry prices, AI packaging strategies, and overall industry dynamics.

stocks.ai_explanation: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM), known for producing advanced semiconductor technologies. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), a leading manufacturer of microprocessors and graphics processors. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Applied Materials, Inc. (ASML), a Dutch multinational corporation specializing in photolithography equipment. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Intel Corporation (INTC), a major player in the semiconductor industry. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Qualcomm Incorporated (QCOM), a leader in wireless communications and semiconductor design. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
